summary: Iter 16 — Wallet (Razorpay) + Ad Platform (Meta/Google/LinkedIn) full backend + frontend integration testing. 22/22 backend pytest pass, all 7 frontend UI flows pass.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~5150 lines — should eventually be split into modules (wallet.py, ad_platform.py, scheduler.py) for maintainability.
_get_or_create_wallet has a TOCTOU race on first call (find -> insert without unique index). Add unique index on wallets.user_id to prevent dup wallets under concurrency.

_meta_post return on PAUSE/RESUME (status update) ignores HTTP errors when MOCK is off — the response shape (no 'id' field for status update) may break downstream consumers; consider explicit error surface.

wallet_topup_verify performs no idempotency check — if the same razorpay_payment_id is submitted twice, wallet would double-credit. Recommend unique index on wallet_transactions.razorpay_payment_id and a duplicate-check.

auto-recharge logic is configured but the actual auto-charge worker that consumes saved card token is NOT visible in this iter — it's only stored config. Confirm with main agent if charging worker is wired or planned for a future iter.
Ad campaign ext IDs use mock_<hex> in MOCK mode — fine, but pause/resume API path '/{ext_campaign_id}' would 502 against real Meta if ever flipped to live without first re-creating campaigns.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 Meta ad account (act_1234567890 'Test Ad Account') + multiple mock campaigns via launch-plan. Created 1 ephemeral LinkedIn account (li_temp_test) deleted by the test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet + Ad Platform endpoints all working. META_ADS_MOCK_MODE=true (default). Razorpay test keys live (rzp_test_S0det8rxQtxeZ3). Real Razorpay sandbox order creation succeeds. Bad signature path correctly returns 400. Ad accounts correctly stored encrypted (access_token_enc Fernet ciphertext, plaintext never returned). Campaign list, pause/resume, launch-plan all green. UI: Billing page WalletPanel + Auto-recharge + Transactions panel render correctly with subscription plans below. Sidebar 'Ad Campaigns' nav with PAID badge present. /ad-campaigns page DEMO MODE banner + 3 platform cards + connect modal + launch CTA + campaign cards (Pause/Resume) all functional. data-testids present and match the spec.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this iter. All 22 backend tests + 7 frontend flows pass on the first run.
